EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for general Zint leads.
EmailTemplate.name: Zint General_SDR
EmailTemplate.subject: Looking for business insurance?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
Having come across your business, I believe our business insurance may be of interest to you as we offer coverage tailored specifically to your industry.
Here at Kingsbridge, we offer a complete package of cover that is designed specifically for UK businesses.
I am confident I can provide you with a competitive quote in 5-10 minutes. Not ready for a quote yet? Book a call with me closer to your renewal date - https://calendly.com/d/cm3g-k74-js2/kingsbridge-insurance-call-back
Plus, if you book a call with me, I can provide you with an additional welcome discount.
Alternatively, you can reply to let me know a good time to call or contact me on 01242 807223. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
